gist.headline: Welcome to the Studio
gist.blurb: The community garden keeps growing! Pollinations-ai-STUDIO just landed in the showcase, bringing a fresh interface for tweaking image generation parameters and exploring API endpoints.
gist.summary: Added Pollinations-ai-STUDIO to the community apps directory, providing users with a new interface for image generation and API integration.
gist.impact: Creators have a new dedicated studio app to experiment with image generation parameters and test API endpoints.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot (Polly) in a cozy art studio setting, acting as a creator/artist. She wears a tiny painter's beret and works at a retro computer terminal that looks like an easel, generating images.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret working at a retro computer terminal that looks like an artist's easel. The screen glows with a lime green (#ecf874) image generation interface. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
